title: selago geniculata
intro: Selago geniculata, also known as the Cape gentian, is a plant species that belongs to the family Gentianaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in South Africa, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Selago geniculata include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and support immune function, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, Selago geniculata is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
